---
title: Inline Style
permalink: /index.html

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
	<head>
		<meta charset="utf-8" />
		<title>{{ title }}</title>
		<style>
			@import "fake-css-pkg/main.css";

    		.local {
    			color: blue;
    		}
    	</style>
    </head>
    <body>
    	<h1>Hello</h1>
    </body>

</html>
